category_sources: source_facts.description says stand-alone DNS-over-HTTPS resolver using libcurl; official README at https://github.com/curl/doh#readme says it resolves host names using DNS-over-HTTPS.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is doh; official curl/doh repository and executable use doh.
